'''rachowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fiants|fiants]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ch-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fiants|fiants]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rachowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ræcheweth || ræchewej || ræchewesh || ræchewe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rachochowoth || rachochowoj || rachochowosh || rachochowo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || rachowoth || rachowoj || rachowosh || rachowo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rachofwofth || rachofwofj || rachofwofsh || rachofwof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || rachowotho || rachowojo || rachowosho || rachowoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || rachowoth || rachowoj || rachowosh || rachowo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || rachowothol || rachowojol || rachowoshol || rachowokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || rachowoothotho || rachowoojojo || rachowooshosho || rachowooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || rachowothon || rachowojon || rachowoshon || rachowokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || rachowothooro || rachowojooro || rachowoshooro || rachowokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
